title: 300 Pcs Classic Building Bricks, Light Grey Bulk Bricks, Compatible With All Major Brand Parts and Pieces, Creative Building Block Toys for Boys Girls Ages 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 Years Old (Light Grey)
features: 【Features】Compatible with le-goo all series of classic building blocks. This product works perfectly with your own bricks and can help with kids' creative thinking.

【Material】All of our products are made of environmentally friendly materials like ABS plastic, which is safe and non-toxic to play. Families can rest assured to buy for your kids and use it with peace of mind.

【Cost-Effective】This building block set can be expanded to add more interesting elements to make buildings more diverse and interesting. If you need a bunch of similar building blocks but want to save money comparing to buying big brands, this set is perfect!

【Gift】This building block set is a great tool to cultivate your child's creativity and can help improve hand-eye coordination skill, making it a perfect birthday, Christmas or any other gift for your children.

【Service】Our products have passed the CPC certification, so the quality is guaranteed and you can buy with confidence. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us so that we can provide you with the best service.
description: Product description Item Name: Classic Bricks, Compatible with Le-go And All Major Brick Brand. Material: high quality ABS plastic Package: Simple packaging Product Service: If you have any questions about the product, please feel free to contact us, we will help you. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or heat source.
